creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 183654
Patch to update default version of PostgreSQL to 9.5 with UPDATING

As promised i updated the description and use pkg create now. Also added a notice about different version and a note to start the database again after the update.

Since really nobody tested it till now, i will hit my colleges for some testing. They are not using FreeBSD on a daily basis, but this will provide some helpful feedback about novices.

Of course it would be fine if somebody other also test it ;)
